summary: Share Action Feature Testing Complete - All 10 test cases PASSED. Share button on feed cards opens modal with preview (user, title, community, trust score) and 4 share options. Share page at /app/action/{id} displays full action details. Invalid IDs show 404 message.

minor.issue: Console shows 'body stream already read' error when handling 404 response - doesn't affect functionality but could be cleaner

critical_code_review_comments: Share modal correctly uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
ShareModal component is well-organized inside ActionFeed.js
ActionSharePage.js correctly handles loading, not-found, and success states
All 4 share options (Copy, WhatsApp, LinkedIn, Twitter) work correctly
seed_data_creation: Used existing action ID 69b6b246302458e7d6ca4e2b with trust_signal=8
context_for_next_testing_agent: Share feature fully functional. Action ID 69b6b246302458e7d6ca4e2b has user_name=newuser, community=E2E Test Community, trust_signal=8. Share modal has 4 options. Share page at /app/action/{id}.

features_verified.1_share_button_on_cards: PASS - Share button (share icon) visible on all feed cards
features_verified.2_modal_with_preview: PASS - Modal shows user name, title, community, trust score in preview
features_verified.3_four_share_options: PASS - Copy link, WhatsApp, LinkedIn, Twitter/X buttons present
features_verified.4_copy_link_functionality: PASS - Copy link button copies URL and shows 'Copied!' feedback
features_verified.5_close_modal_x_button: PASS - X button closes modal correctly
features_verified.7_share_page_loads: PASS - /app/action/{id} loads with full preview card
features_verified.8_share_page_content: PASS - Shows user name, title, description, category, community, reactions, trust score
features_verified.9_share_page_navigation: PASS - 'Back to feed' link and 'View more actions' CTA work
features_verified.10_invalid_action_404: PASS - Invalid/non-existent ID shows 'Action not found' message
